@kimmonismus
Everyone's still arguing about which lab wins the model race.
Satya Nadella made an interesting point: the smarter AI gets, the more valuable human judgment becomes. (Machines don't decide what's worth doing, you do.) "Without human direction, you have compute running in circles."
Satya Nadella
@satyanadella
16h
Article
A frontier without an ecosystem is not stable
I’ve been thinking a lot about the future of the firm in an AI-driven economy.

discovery_record.discovery_title: 纳德拉：AI越智能，人类判断越有价值
discovery_record.discovery_summary: 所有人仍在争论哪个实验室赢得模型竞赛。 萨提亚·纳德拉提出了一个有趣的观点：AI 越智能，人类判断就越有价值。（机器不决定什么值得做，你决定。）"没有人类指引，计算就是在原地打转。"

key_excerpts.text: 所有人仍在争论哪个实验室赢得模型竞赛。 萨提亚·纳德拉提出了一个有趣的观点：AI 越智能，人类判断就越有价值。（机器不决定什么值得做，你决定。）"没有人类指引，计算就是在原地打转。"
